calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2025 Continued To Apr-09-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-31-2024 Set For Case Management Conference On Feb-05-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PACIFIC MARITIME ASSOCIATION's Motion for Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

At 9:30 a.m., matter called.

Atty. TAYLOR D. HORN, Esq. of Seyfarth Shaw LLP (Tel: 415-397-2823) for defendant Pacific Maritime Association is present (via Zoom videoconference).

Plaintiff not present. Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Pacific Maritime Association's motion for summary judgment or in the alternative, summary adjudication is granted as unopposed.

Order signed.

At 9:52 a.m., matter re-called.

Plaintiff LATANYA LYLES-TAYLOR now present in pro per. (Counsel for defendant no longer present.)

The Court informs plaintiff this matter was called already, and the Court adopted its tentative ruling to grant defendant's motion as unopposed. The Court confirms with the plaintiff that she never filed an opposition to the present motion. The Court informs plaintiff that, as such, the Court's ruling to grant defendant's motion as unopposed stands.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
